title: Property photos & video
description: Selling or renting? I can grab aerial shots and smooth video of the outside (and inside if you want) so the listing looks a bit more interesting than the usual phone snaps.
highlights: Good for Rightmove, social, or estate agent listings
imageAlt: Drone view of a modern property at golden hour

title: Gardens, land & scenery
description: Gardens, parks, big back yards, countryside views—anything where you want to show off the space from above. Handy if you're selling land or just want something nice for Instagram.
highlights: Wide shots that show the whole area
Good light and simple edits included
imageAlt: Aerial landscape showcasing rural terrain and greenery

title: Roof checks
description: I can fly close and get clear photos of your roof—useful if you want to spot obvious damage or missing tiles without climbing a ladder. I'm not a surveyor, but the pictures can help you decide what to do next.
highlights: Close-up shots of tiles, gutters, and chimneys
Safer than getting up on the roof yourself
Photos you can send to a roofer or insurer
imageAlt: Drone inspection view of rooftop details

title: Weddings & parties
description: Birthdays, weddings, village fêtes—I'll stay out of the way and grab some aerial footage of the venue and guests. Nice for a highlights reel or just something to look back on.
highlights: Flyovers of the venue and crowd
I'll plan around guests and keep it safe
imageAlt: Aerial footage of a wedding and guests outdoors

title: Fields & farms
description: Crop fields, farmyards, paddocks—drone shots can show the scale of the place better than standing on the ground. Good for social media or just keeping a record of the season.
highlights: Wide shots across fields and farm buildings
Useful for social posts or farm records
imageAlt: Aerial footage of a crop field
